title: Filesystem Write, Update, and Delete Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → PuterFSProvider: write_new({ context, parent, name, file })
PuterFSProvider → PuterFSProvider: #storage_upload({ uuid, bucket, bucket_region, file, tmp })
PuterFSProvider#storage_upload → storageController: upload({ uid, file, storage_meta, storage_api })
PuterFSProvider → svc_resource: register({ uid, status: RESOURCE_STATUS_PENDING_CREATE })
PuterFSProvider → FSEntryController: insert(raw_fsentry) → returns Insert op
Caller → PuterFSProvider: write_overwrite({ context, node, file })
PuterFSProvider → PuterFSProvider: #storage_upload({ uuid, bucket, bucket_region, file, tmp })
PuterFSProvider → svc_resource: register({ uid, status: RESOURCE_STATUS_PENDING_CREATE })
PuterFSProvider → FSEntryController: update(uid, raw_fsentry_delta) → returns Update op
Caller → PuterFSProvider: unlink({ context, node, options }) OR rmdir()
FSEntryController → FSEntryController: enqueue_(Delete op) → exec_() → db.batch_write()
Caller → PuterFSProvider: move({ context, node, new_parent, new_name, metadata })
PuterFSProvider → FSEntryController: update(node.uid, { parent_uid, path, name, metadata })
FSEntryController.enqueue_(op): checks queue size vs max_queue (default 50), awaits if full
enqueue_: routes op to currentState.queue (STATUS_READY) or deferredState.queue (STATUS_RUNNING_JOB)
enqueue_: notifies entryListeners_ for the op.uuid, then calls checkShouldExec_()
exec_: sets all ops STATUS_DONE, calls flipState_() (promotes deferredState → currentState)
flipState_: resolves queueSizePromise so blocked enqueue_ calls can proceed
key_relationships: BaseOperation uses TeePromise for awaitDone()/STATUS_DONE signaling
PuterFSProvider depends_on svc_acl, svc_resource, svc_size, svc_metering, svc_event, svc_fs
FSEntryController maintains two queues: currentState and deferredState (double-buffer pattern)

operation_sql.Update.getStatement: UPDATE fsentries SET field=? WHERE uuid=? LIMIT 1
operation_sql.Delete.getStatement: DELETE FROM fsentries WHERE uuid=? LIMIT 1

queue_state_machine.STATUS_READY: idle, accepts to currentState.queue, triggers exec_()
queue_state_machine.STATUS_RUNNING_JOB: batch executing, new ops go to deferredState.queue
queue_state_machine.flipState_: after exec_, deferredState becomes currentState, new deferredState created, queueSizePromise resolved

important_notes: Double-buffer queue: currentState runs immediately; deferredState holds ops arriving during execution. max_queue=50 (configurable via svc_params). TeePromise (from 'teepromise') enables multiple awaiters on same operation. ACL checked in PuterFSProvider before insert/update (not in FSEntryController). Storage upload happens BEFORE fsentry insert. svc_resource tracks pending creates to prevent race conditions in stat().
